exploration_notes: Traced the complete Flink checkpoint coordination architecture from CheckpointCoordinator.triggerCheckpoint() through 9 phases: (1) trigger initiation with async pipeline on JobManager, (2) PendingCheckpoint creation with OperatorCoordinator and master state snapshots, (3) RPC dispatch to source tasks via Execution→TaskManagerGateway→TaskExecutor→Task chain, (4) barrier injection into the data stream via SubtaskCheckpointCoordinatorImpl, (5) barrier propagation through network channels, (6) barr
